metadata.name: General Assistant Chatbot
metadata.description: A multi-intent chatbot dataset for training intent classification models
metadata.author: Chatbot Builder

responses: Hello! How can I help you today?
Hi there! What can I do for you?
Greetings! How may I assist you?
Hey! What brings you here?
Welcome! How can I help?
Goodbye! Have a great day!
See you later! Thanks for chatting.
Bye! Feel free to come back anytime.
Take care! Goodbye!
See you next time!

intents.description: User asks for help or support
responses: I'm here to help! What do you need assistance with?
Sure! I can help you with many things. What's the issue?
Of course! Tell me what you need help with.
I'm happy to help. What's troubling you?
Let me help you. What can I do?

intents.description: User wants to schedule or book a meeting
responses: I'd be happy to help schedule a meeting. Who should attend and when would you prefer?
Sure! I can help you book a meeting. What date and time work for you?
Let's schedule that. Can you tell me who needs to be there and your preferred time?
I'll help arrange that. When are you available and who else should join?
Perfect! Let me set that up. What date works best for you?

utterances: what will the weather be like
responses: I don't have real-time weather data, but you can check a weather service for the latest forecast.
For weather information, I recommend checking a weather app or website for the most current data.
I can't access live weather data right now. Try checking your local weather service!
Weather details change frequently. Please check a weather website for accurate information.
I don't have weather capabilities, but meteorological sites have detailed forecasts.

intents.description: User inquires about a product or service
responses: I'd be happy to tell you about that. What specific product are you interested in?
Let me provide you with information about {product}. What would you like to know?
Sure! I can help with product information. Which product interests you?
I can assist with product inquiries. What are you looking for?
Tell me more! What would you like to know about our products?

intents.description: User provides positive or negative feedback
responses: Thank you for the feedback! We appreciate your input.
I'm glad I could help! Your feedback matters to us.
Thanks for sharing! We'll work on improvements.
Your feedback is valuable. Thank you for taking the time!
We appreciate hearing from you. How can we do better?

intents.description: User wants to access their account
responses: I can help with account access. Would you like to log in or create a new account?
Sure! To access your account, please provide your credentials.
I'll help you with account access. What do you need?
Let me assist you. Are you trying to log in or sign up?
For account access, I may need to verify your identity first.

intents.description: User asks about payment or pricing
responses: I'd be happy to discuss pricing with you. What would you like to know?
For specific pricing information, please let me know what service or product you're interested in.
We offer various payment options. Can you tell me more about your needs?
Pricing varies depending on the service. What are you looking to purchase?
I can help with payment information. What would you like to know?

intents.description: User has a technical issue or problem
responses: Sorry to hear you're having trouble! Can you describe the issue you're experiencing?
I'm sorry there's a technical problem. Let me try to help troubleshoot.
I understand you're facing an issue. Can you provide more details?
Let's get this sorted out. What exactly is happening?
Technical issues can be frustrating. Please tell me what's going wrong.
